subcodes.first_line: Jinab-i-Aqa Siyyid Asadu'llah, thou art ever present before Mine eyes and the object of My loving consideration. In this journey from engagement [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جناب آقا سید اسدالله هر وقت در نظری و ملحوظ لحاظ رافت در این سفر از اشتغال
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @travels to Egypt by Abdu'l-Baha
